paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.58, representing a 1.05% decrease from the prior close and a 24.28% decrease over the last 21 trading sessions.

There are no recent news headlines available, but social posts indicate that Google has raised its FY26 CapEx guide and that Fermi Inc. has announced the arrival of Siemens turbines at the Port of Houston.

Fermi Inc. has filed several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson, as well as an 8-K filing regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There is also one Form 4 filing in the feed.
